site.name: Govardhan Reddy Narala
site.headline: Data Scientist and Software Engineer building applied ML, analytics, and cloud-native systems.
site.heroIntro: I build production-grade data products, ML prototypes, and backend systems that move from research to reliable delivery.
heroSummary: Master's in Data Science with prior software and data engineering experience across integrations, APIs, and analytics.
This portfolio is designed as a case-study-driven site: projects, architecture context, and evidence of execution.

projectOverrides.title: CivicQuest
projectOverrides.summary: AI-supported community engagement platform for volunteering discovery, sustainability learning, and guided interaction.
highlights: AI-powered community engagement platform
Volunteer discovery and registration journeys
Gamified sustainability learning plus Azure bot integration

projectOverrides.title: Disease Networks for Disease Clustering
projectOverrides.summary: Unsupervised graph convolution workflow for clustering disease relationships from disease-gene networks and ontology signals.
highlights: Built disease-gene network representations
Learned unsupervised embeddings for disease clustering
Combined graph structure with Gene Ontology features

projectOverrides.title: Zero Hunger Big Data Analytics Pipeline
projectOverrides.summary: Distributed analytics pipeline using Hadoop ecosystem tools to transform large food and hunger datasets into queryable outputs.
highlights: Distributed ingestion and processing pipeline
Reusable analytics tables and downstream queries
Policy-oriented analysis for hunger-related data

projectOverrides.title: Houston Crime Type Classification (2010-2024)
projectOverrides.summary: Large-scale temporal classification project using millions of records, feature engineering, and holdout evaluation for crime prediction.
highlights: Processed roughly 3.6M records with a true temporal holdout
Built end-to-end feature engineering and modeling workflow
Reported macro metrics and practical evaluation tradeoffs

projectOverrides.title: Multimodal Book Genre Classification and Clustering
projectOverrides.summary: Hybrid multimodal pipeline combining image and text signals for genre prediction and clustering on large book datasets.
highlights: Combined cover images and title text in one pipeline
Supported both supervised prediction and clustering
Designed for large-scale experimentation

projectOverrides.title: Adversarial Attacks on Deep Neural Networks
projectOverrides.summary: Robustness experiments analyzing adversarial attacks, defenses, and model behavior under FGSM and PGD conditions.
highlights: Studied attack effectiveness and defense behavior
Measured robustness changes across settings
Notebook-driven experimentation workflow

projectOverrides.title: Boomi CI/CD Experiments
projectOverrides.summary: Experiments around integration delivery workflows, automation, and CI/CD patterns for Boomi-based systems.
highlights: Explored deployment automation for integration assets
Tested pipeline approaches for repeatable delivery
Focused on integration support tooling

projectOverrides.title: Node E-Commerce Use Case
projectOverrides.summary: API-oriented e-commerce use case covering shopping flows, backend logic, and service design basics.
highlights: Implemented core e-commerce backend flows
Used API-first design for shopping interactions
Built a foundation for larger full-stack demos

projectOverrides.title: Microservices Using .NET Core
projectOverrides.summary: Clean-architecture microservices system using messaging, RPC, caching, and multiple persistence layers.
highlights: Designed loosely coupled services with clean architecture
Used RabbitMQ and gRPC for inter-service communication
Applied cache and polyglot persistence patterns

projectOverrides.title: ASP.NET Core Docs (Fork)
projectOverrides.summary: Reference fork of ASP.NET Core documentation used for study and internal notes.
highlights: Maintained as a working reference repo
Useful for .NET architecture and API patterns
Supports learning and implementation review

projectOverrides.title: deploy.github.io
projectOverrides.summary: Minimal static deployment experiment for lightweight hosting and GitHub Pages-style publication.
highlights: Lightweight static deployment setup
Useful baseline for simple hosting workflows
Small experiment in publishing and delivery
